books.title: Team of Rivals
books.author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
books.quote: His ambition was a little engine that knew no rest.
books.note: Lincoln didn't push his rivals aside — he pulled them into his cabinet. This book is a masterclass in emotional intelligence, political strategy, and what it means to lead people who once wanted your job. Reading it slowly, one chapter at a time, and every page feels like a lesson.
